en:
My new neighbour is awful.
He plays his music very loudly every night.
He often starts at ten o'clock and never stops early.
Sometimes I telephone him, but he never answers the phone.
This evening the noise begins again.
I am always tired the next day.
How often does he do this? Almost every day!
cn:
我的新邻居真讨厌。
他每天晚上都把音乐放得很大声。
他经常十点钟开始，而且从不早点停下来。
有时我给他打电话，可他从不接。
今晚噪音又开始了。
第二天我总是很累。
他多久这样一次？几乎每天！

en:
Excuse me, can you tell me the way to the station?
Go straight along this street for two minutes.
Turn left at the first corner.
Then walk past the big bank on your right.
The station is at the next corner.
Don't turn right there; go straight on.
You can't miss it!
cn:
打扰一下，你能告诉我去车站的路吗？
沿着这条街直走两分钟。
在第一个拐角向左转。
然后走过你右边那家大银行。
车站就在下一个拐角。
别在那儿向右转，一直往前走。
你肯定找得到！

en:
I want a new pair of shoes for the party.
These black shoes are nice, but they are too small.
Those brown ones are my size, but they are too dear.
The shoes on sale are cheap.
But this pair is very uncomfortable.
My feet hurt after ten minutes.
I think I must look in another shop.
cn:
我想买一双新鞋去参加聚会。
这双黑鞋很好看，可是太小了。
那双棕色的是我的尺码，可是太贵了。
减价的鞋很便宜。
但这一双穿着很不舒服。
十分钟后我的脚就疼了。
我想我得去另一家店看看。

en:
Tom has a terrible toothache today.
He looks ill and cannot eat his lunch.
"You must see a dentist," his sister says.
"The dentist can help you."
Tom is afraid. "Must the dentist pull my tooth?"
"Maybe, but you must go now."
So Tom must be brave.
cn:
汤姆今天牙疼得厉害。
他看上去病恹恹的，午饭也吃不下。
“你必须去看牙医，”他姐姐说。
“牙医能帮你。”
汤姆很害怕。“牙医非得拔我的牙吗？”
“也许吧，但你现在必须去。”
所以汤姆必须勇敢一点。

en:
Carol is writing a shopping list.
She needs some sugar and a pound of butter.
There isn't any soap in the bathroom.
She wants some toothpaste too.
"Do we have any magazines?" she asks.
"No, we don't have any," her mother says.
So Carol puts two magazines on the list.
cn:
卡罗尔正在写一张购物清单。
她需要一些糖和一磅黄油。
浴室里没有肥皂了。
她还想要一些牙膏。
“我们有杂志吗？”她问。
“没有，我们一本也没有，”她妈妈说。
于是卡罗尔在清单上写下了两本杂志。

en:
Tonight I am going to cook a big dinner.
I am going to roast some beef in the oven.
I am going to make some potatoes and green beans too.
Are you going to buy a cabbage?
Yes, and I am going to make a sweet dessert.
My friends are going to love this meal!
cn:
今晚我打算做一顿丰盛的晚餐。
我打算在烤箱里烤一些牛肉。
我还打算做一些土豆和青豆。
你打算买一棵卷心菜吗？
是的，我还打算做一道甜甜的甜点。
我的朋友们一定会喜欢这顿饭！

en:
Our family is going on holiday tomorrow.
"Have you packed your suitcase?" Mum asks.
"Yes, I have already packed it," I say.
"The weather is cold there, so take a warm sweater."
"I have already put two sweaters inside."
Dad has already packed the car.
We are all ready for our holiday!
cn:
我们一家明天要去度假。
“你收拾好手提箱了吗？”妈妈问。
“收拾好了，我已经装好了，”我说。
“那里天气很冷，带一件暖和的毛衣吧。”
“我已经放了两件毛衣进去了。”
爸爸已经把车装好了。
我们都准备好去度假了！
